originalTitle: AI is revolutionising the stock market
summary: Big Tech no longer prints money; it needs it. What will that mean when confidence dips?
content: Big Tech no longer prints money; it needs it. What will that mean when confidence dips?
chineseTitle: AI 正在彻底改变股市
chineseSummary: 大型科技公司不再印钞；它需要它。当信心下降时这意味着什么？
chineseContent: 大型科技公司不再印钞；它需要它。当信心下降时这意味着什么？
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
